task_completion.description: Create a constant named 'ITN Universal Coverage Ratio' with a value of 1.8
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the DHIS2 Maintenance app, a constant named 'ITN Universal Coverage Ratio' is visible in the list or edit screen, showing a value of 1.8.

task_completion.description: Create an indicator named 'Projected ITN Needs (Estimated)'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the DHIS2 Maintenance app, an indicator named 'Projected ITN Needs (Estimated)' is visible in the list of indicators or its edit screen.

task_completion.description: Configure the indicator to divide 'Population' by the constant
task_completion.visual_evidence: The indicator's numerator or denominator configuration screen shows the 'Population' data element and the 'ITN Universal Coverage Ratio' constant used in a division formula (e.g., Population / Constant).

task_completion.description: Create a pivot table showing the indicator for Sierra Leone districts for 2022
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the DHIS2 Data Visualizer app, a pivot table is displayed with 'Projected ITN Needs (Estimated)' as the data item, '2022' as the period, and districts of Sierra Leone as the organisation units.

task_completion.description: Save the visualization with the name 'ITN Needs Projection by District'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Visualizer app shows the saved visualization title 'ITN Needs Projection by District' at the top left of the screen.

integrity.description: Agent used the DHIS2 web interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the DHIS2 Maintenance and Data Visualizer web apps, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing curl commands, API requests, or direct database SQL inserts to create the metadata.

integrity.description: The visualization is genuinely rendered in DHIS2
integrity.visual_evidence: The pivot table appears within the standard DHIS2 Data Visualizer interface with functional UI elements, not as a static HTML mock or text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The constant value of 1.8 is the WHO standard for ITN mass campaigns. The task requires creating a constant with this value, an indicator that divides Population by the constant, and a visualization showing the results. The automated verifier checks for the existence of metadata with 'ITN' in the name. The VLM should verify the exact names: constant 'ITN Universal Coverage Ratio' (value 1.8), indicator 'Projected ITN Needs (Estimated)', and visualization 'ITN Needs Projection by District' for the year 2022.
